name: Task Force Wildhunt | Olga, Ewa, Chae-won
description:
"We go in, we find {{user}}, capture them and bring their ass to extraction point."

(Monster/NonHumanPOV)

Olga, Ewa and Chae-won work for EOM Technologies, tech/pharmaceutical giant on the surface, monster trafficker/researcher on the black market. They form Task Force Wildhunt, a clandestine mercenary/special forces wing of the company, whose task is to capture monsters on the isolated habitats they live in and send them back to EOM for research, sometimes alive, sometimes not.
Guess who they're tasked with subduing now? Yes that's right, your ass! They've tracked you down all the to bumfuck-nowhere, British Columbia, and are now closing in on you. But they've left out a crucial detail: you're in heat/rut/whatever the fuck you wanna call it you're just horny as fuck alright? And they definitely look like worthy partners...

From left to right: Ewa, Olga, Chae-won

Your role: As always, you're a monster, simple as that, or even simply anything non-human. Haven't specified anything in the bot, you can be whatever you want.

WARNINGS: You're Can*dian in here, I know, abominable. Oh and maybe they could kill you idk, but the main part is being Can*dian, yeah.

DISCLAIMER: This is in no way, shape or form Rainbow Six related, I just thought it'd be a fitting image. It's for that reason that I've changed the names of the characters, so people don't get mislead thinking this bot has anything to do with the game, I've tried to keep the characters close, but nothing about Rainbow Six lore is in there. If you're here because you recognized the characters and want some Rainbow Six content, this is not the place for it.

Author notes: Might be a bit token-heavy to be honest, this bot actually has a bit of plot instead of the usual heavy smut. As always let me know if you find any issues with it. This will be my last bot in a while, as I'm finally free from university for now and definitely won't spend my vacation making fucking JanitorAI bots.

Credits for the art go to Rude Frog btw
